intervals.intent: let the rain be heard alone before the silhouette arrives
rain texture settles into the opening 1.8s of the macro shot
the drainpipe pulse holds · then we move to the steamed window
final decompression · the rain holds for 2s after the cut

cut_philosophy: four cuts in 23 seconds · cuts_per_minute ≈ 10 inside the capsule alone · but the silence between cuts averages 1.7s · the lived rhythm of someone who stopped walking to look at something · NOT TikTok pacing
